Coming Events

July 1994
Journalism & Newsroom

The article announces upcoming journalism training events including a NICAR seminar in Columbia, Missouri and an IRE computer-assisted reporting conference in San Jose, California.

Coming Events

August 14-19 NICAR Training Seminar Columbia, Missouri October 6-9 IRE Computer-Assisted Reporting Conference San Jose, California
